reasoning: Haan, it has to be Shantanu. He kept his word on CAA — that was the promise in 2019, and four years later, certificates are actually being issued to Matua refugees. Biswajit Das is just an opportunist jumping between parties; TMC putting him here shows they're panicking and desperate. I've seen enough of TMC's gundaism here in Bangaon — the booth-level muscle, the corruption racket in teacher recruitment, Sandeshkhali. That's not something I'm going to vote for again. Shantanu's a Matua, he's done something for Hindu refugees, and he's the incumbent with actual momentum. My vote doesn't change easily, but when someone delivers, that matters.
primary_drivers: Shantanu kept his promise on CAA — certificates are actually happening
TMC's visible gundaism and corruption — teacher jobs scam, Sandeshkhali, local muscle politics
Biswajit Das is an opportunist defector — can't trust someone who switches for tickets
